summary: The diff implements REQ-4 comprehensively. The iframe uses position:fixed, inset:0, width:100vw, height:100dvh. The html/body/#root reset in index.css removes margin, padding, and sets overflow:hidden. The branded bar is a fixed overlay that does not reduce iframe height. The viewport meta includes viewport-fit=cover for iPhone notch support. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: Credits panel with project information triggered by an info button
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks for fixing the full-screen layout and keeping the branded bar visible. It does not request a credits panel or info button interaction.
